title: Disable Cobbreeding Breeding Addon
description: adds an option for Cobbreeding on a pokemon to permanently disable its breeding.
body:
This mod changes Cobbreeding’s spay/neuter toggle into a safer, permanent breeding-disable action.

When a Pokémon is marked as spayed/neutered, breeding cannot be re-enabled afterward. The action is limited to the Pokémon’s original trainer, and the client adds a Cobblemon-style confirmation popup before sending the toggle request to help prevent accidental permanent changes.

Requires Cobblemon and Cobbreeding.
